questionText: Does your organization conduct leak detection and repair (LDAR) or use other methods to find and fix fugitive methane emissions from coal mining activities?
questionKo: 조직 (LDAR) 사용 기타 방법 배출량 석탄 광업 활동?
simpleHelp: Investors are interested in how organizations approach methane leak detection and repair (LDAR), or other methane leak detection methods, in order to gauge how effectively methane emissions are being reduced.
baseOptions: No, we do not have a program in place
No, this is not relevant to our operations

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Any option selected - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Option NOT selected - 0/4 points
A maximum of 0/4 points is available for this route.
